bindings.quest_action: follow the trail and find who poisoned the water supply
bindings.quest_focus: the contaminated well at the heart of the settlement
bindings.quest_stakes: more people falling ill or dying from the tainted water
bindings.quest_threat: deliberate sabotage from within the community
bindings.quest_origin: traces of a foreign toxin found near the well

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, close the door. What I'm about to tell you doesn't leave this room.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Someone has been poisoning the settlement's water supply. Three people have fallen ill in the last week, and {target_npc} nearly died before the alchemist figured out what was happening. I found traces of {quest_item} ground into powder near {quest_focus}: a substance that doesn't grow anywhere near {location}. Someone brought it here deliberately. The trail leads {location_hint}, and I suspect whoever did this has ties to the {enemy_type} raids we've been suffering. This isn't bad luck. It's {quest_threat}.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need someone I can trust to {quest_action}. And right now, I can't trust anyone in this settlement.

playerResponses.text: Poisoning a water supply is as low as it gets. I'll find who did this.
Intrigue and poison? I'll investigate, but I want full access and no interference.
I don't do conspiracy work. Call the guard.

bindings.quest_action: uncover the puppet master behind the assassination
bindings.quest_stakes: the wrong person hanging for a murder they were coerced into
bindings.quest_threat: a hidden manipulator orchestrating killings from the shadows
bindings.quest_origin: a rare toxin disguised as a natural heart attack

dialogueChunks.intro: Don't sit at the bar, {player_name}. Come to the back. This isn't a conversation for the common room.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement council leader was found dead in their study three nights ago. Officially, it was a heart attack. Unofficially, I found {quest_item} residue on the rim of their cup: {quest_origin}. {target_npc} was the last person seen entering the study, and they've been acting strange ever since: avoiding questions, locking their doors, pacing at night. But they're a good person, {player_name}. I don't think they acted alone. {quest_threat} is somewhere {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Help me find the truth before {quest_stakes}.

playerResponses.text: Murder disguised as illness? I'll uncover whoever is behind it.
This is darker than what I usually handle. But I'll look into it.
Politics and poison are a dangerous mix. Leave me out of it.

bindings.quest_action: retrieve a coded letter that identifies the informant
bindings.quest_focus: trade route information being leaked to raiders
bindings.quest_stakes: more caravans being ambushed and more lives lost on the roads
bindings.quest_threat: a traitor inside the settlement feeding intelligence to the enemy
bindings.quest_origin: a pattern of redirected caravans into ambush points

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I've been watching you. You're not from here, which means you're the only person I can confide in.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Our settlement's trade agreements have been sabotaged from within. Caravans are being redirected into {enemy_type} ambushes, and it's costing us lives and goods. {quest_threat} is feeding route information to raiders. I've narrowed it down to three suspects, but confronting any of them would tip off the traitor. {target_npc} found a coded letter hidden {location_hint} that might identify the informant, but retrieving it means getting past whatever guards the traitor posted.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need that letter. Without evidence, {quest_stakes}.

playerResponses.text: A traitor selling out their own people? I'll get that letter.
Spy work, then. I'll do it, but I want the traitor exposed publicly.

bindings.quest_action: intercept a shipment of alchemical compounds and expose the conspiracy
bindings.quest_focus: a pattern of suspicious council member deaths
bindings.quest_stakes: the next target being eliminated before the conspiracy is exposed
bindings.quest_threat: a power-hungry individual eliminating rivals through poison
bindings.quest_origin: three council deaths in a month, all benefiting the same person
bindings.quest_time_pressure: a new shipment arriving that could enable the next killing

dialogueChunks.intro: I shouldn't be telling you this, {player_name}. If the wrong person finds out I talked, I'll be next.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Three council members have died in the past month: all from different causes, all seemingly unrelated. But I've been keeping records, and every death benefits the same person. They've consolidated power over {location} faster than anyone should. Last night I overheard them arranging for a shipment of {quest_item}: a potent alchemical compound: to be delivered from {location_hint}. I think they're planning another move. {target_npc} is the likely target. Someone needs to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: I know how this sounds: paranoid, desperate. But {quest_focus} is there if you look. Please, look.

playerResponses.text: Three deaths and one beneficiary? That's not a pattern, it's a confession. I'm in.
Intercepting shipments and exposing conspiracies. This had better not blow back on me.
I don't investigate murders. You need the authorities.
